task: See Nissan and Honda cars for sale near Kentwood, MI 49512 on CarMax.
graderReasoning: The agent completed the task by going to CarMax, changing the store/location to Grand Rapids (Kentwood), MI 49512, and opening search results pages for both Nissan and Honda. Evidence shows the store was set to 'Your store for 49512 Grand Rapids (Kentwood)' and the Nissan results page at https://www.carmax.com/cars?search=Nissan and Honda results page at https://www.carmax.com/cars?search=Honda were both open with listings visible. The final summary accurately reflects visible counts and sample local 'Test drive today' vehicles from those pages.
final_result_response:
Done. I set the CarMax store/location to Grand Rapids (Kentwood), MI 49512 and opened results for both:

- Honda: 7,607 matches
- Nissan: 7,830 matches

A few local “test drive today” examples:

Honda:
- 2015 Honda CR-V EX-L, 97K mi, $17,998
- 2017 Honda CR-V Touring, 109K mi, $18,998
- 2020 Honda Insight EX, 58K mi, $22,998
- 2022 Honda Civic Sport, 25K mi, $25,998

Nissan:
- 2018 Nissan Sentra S, 48K mi, $14,998
- 2015 Nissan Altima S, 93K mi, $12,998
- 2014 Nissan Altima SL, 75K mi, $14,599
- 2023 Nissan Sentra SR, 63K mi, $19,998

I left the Honda results open in the browser, with a second tab for Nissan.
action_history: Open CarMax: const p1 = await openTab('https://www.carmax.com/');
Open CarMax location selector: await page.locator('e9').click();
Set Grand Rapids Kentwood store: await page.locator('e234').click();
Search Nissan on CarMax: await page.locator('e12').fill('Nissan');
Search Nissan on CarMax: await page.locator('e13').click();
Search Honda on CarMax: await page.locator('e12').fill('Honda');
Search Honda on CarMax: await page.locator('e13').click();
Open Nissan results in a second tab: const p2 = await openTab('https://www.carmax.com/cars?search=Nissan');
Close Honda filter menu: await page.locator('e604').click();

screenshots.title: Open Nissan results in a second tab
Return to Honda tab and close filter
